MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMS, CHARLES THE COURT APPOINTED TRUSTEE OF THE CHAPTER 7 ESTATE OF SHAKO REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT  INC. COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-03-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 10:45AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. THOMAS LORAN FOR THE PLTF. PAUL GOORJIAN FOR THE DEFT. CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARAVANSARY RESTAURANT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 999 BRANNAN ST (NORTHEAST CORNER OF THE GROUND FLOOR), LEASE FORFEITED, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR ITS OWN COSTS, FEES AND EXPENSES OF THIS ACTION.

ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF THIS ENTIRE ACTION JUDGMENT OF JAN-12-1998 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
